name: Palmer Square Capital BDC Inc.
business: We are a financial services company that primarily lends to and invests in corporate debt securities of companies, including small to large private U.S. companies. We also invest in collateralized loan obligation (CLO) structured credit funds that typically own corporate debt securities. Our investment objective is to maximize total return, comprised of current income and capital appreciation.

exposures.sentence: Our current investment focus is guided by two strategies that facilitate our investment opportunities and core competencies: (1) investing in corporate debt securities and, to a lesser extent, (2) investing in collateralized loan obligation (CLO) structured credit funds.

catalysts.event: BoA Credit Facility commitment termination and repayment deadline
catalysts.sentence: The Borrowers ability to draw under the BoA Credit Facility is scheduled to terminate on February 11, 2028. All amounts outstanding under the BoA Credit Facility are required to be repaid by February 18, 2028.

catalysts.event: WF Credit Facility maturity and reinvestment period end
catalysts.sentence: The facility maturity date of the WF Credit Facility is November 4, 2030 and the reinvestment period ends on November 3, 2028

The Notes may be redeemed by the Issuer, at the written direction of (i) a majority of the Subordinated Notes (with the consent of us, in the case of the Secured Notes) or (ii) us, in each case, on any business day on or after July 15, 2026

catalysts.event: Share repurchase program authorization and extension
catalysts.sentence: On November 3, 2025 the Board authorized the Company to repurchase an additional $5 million of shares of its common stock through its open-market share repurchase program and extended the Company's open-market share repurchase program to expire on January 22, 2027.

catalysts.event: Extended Company Rule 10b5-1 Stock Repurchase Plan commencement and termination
catalysts.sentence: The Extended Company Rule 10b5-1 Stock Repurchase Plan commenced on January 22, 2025 and terminated on January 22, 2026.

catalysts.event: Extended PSCM Rule 10b5-1 Stock Purchase Plan commencement and termination conditions
catalysts.sentence: The Extended PSCM Rule 10b5-1 Stock Purchase Plan commenced on May 22, 2025 and will terminate upon the earliest to occur of (i) 12 months from the commencement of the Extended PSCM Rule 10b5-1 Stock Purchase Plan, (ii) the end of the trading day on which the aggregate purchase price for all shares purchased under the Extended PSCM Rule 10b5-1 Stock Purchase Plan equals $2.5 million less any purchases made pursuant to the PSCM Rule 10b5-1 Stock Purchase Plan and (iii) the occurrence of certain other events described in the Extended PSCM Rule 10b5-1 Stock Purchase Plan.
